info.name: Order Management - Mock APIs
info.description:
Mock API collection for order management evaluation process.

Use cases:
1. Find Order
2. Track Order
3. Cancel Order
4. Modify Address
5. Return Item
6. Replace Damaged Item

Base URL: https://{{base_url}}/api/v1

item.name: 1. Find Order

request.description: Retrieve order details by order ID.

response.name: 200 - Order Found
404 - Order Not Found

request.description: Search for orders using customer email.

response.name: 200 - Orders Found

request.description: Search for orders using customer phone number.

response.name: 200 - Orders Found

item.description: APIs to find/search orders by order ID, email, or phone number.

item.name: 2. Track Order

request.description: Get real-time tracking information for an order.

response.name: 200 - Tracking Info (In Transit)
200 - Tracking Info (Delivered)
404 - Order Not Found

item.description: APIs to track order shipment status and delivery events.

item.name: 3. Cancel Order

request.description: Cancel an order. Only orders in 'pending' or 'processing' status can be cancelled.

response.name: 200 - Order Cancelled Successfully
409 - Cannot Cancel (Already Shipped)
404 - Order Not Found

item.description: APIs to cancel an order and initiate refund.

item.name: 4. Modify Address

request.description: Get the current shipping address for an order.

response.name: 200 - Address Retrieved

request.description: Update the shipping address. Only possible before the order has shipped.

response.name: 200 - Address Updated
409 - Cannot Modify (Already Shipped)
400 - Invalid Address

item.description: APIs to view and modify shipping address for an order.

item.name: 5. Return Item

request.description: Initiate a return for one or more items in a delivered order.

response.name: 201 - Return Initiated
409 - Return Not Eligible

request.description: Check the status of a return request.

response.name: 200 - Return Status

item.description: APIs to initiate and track item returns with refund processing.

item.name: 6. Replace Damaged Item

request.description: Request a replacement for a damaged item. Supports image evidence upload.

response.name: 201 - Replacement Approved
201 - Replacement with Refund (Out of Stock)
400 - Missing Damage Details

request.description: Check the status of a replacement request.

response.name: 200 - Replacement Status

item.description: APIs to request and track replacements for damaged or defective items.
